prompt: Create a premium Instagram-inspired cinematic fashion poster featuring HANIA AI as a glamorous young woman standing confidently on a floating transparent glass platform above soft clouds at golden hour. She wears an elegant cream-white oversized blazer and matching wide-leg trousers over a pastel pink satin top, layered gold necklaces, gold bracelets, a slim belt, a cream luxury handbag with a gold chain strap, and clear high-heel sandals. Use a photorealistic editorial fashion style with soft glamorous makeup, long wavy hair, luxury styling, and a confident influencer pose with one hand in her pocket and the handbag held at her side. Behind her, create a massive glowing holographic typography installation reading “HANIA AI” in huge inflated glossy translucent letters, peach-pink neon edges, chrome-gold outlines, and internal warm lighting. Place the smaller top-center text “HANIA AI” with the tagline “MADE TO INSPIRE.” Build a dreamy futuristic city skyline in the background with sunset clouds, warm peach, pink, lavender, and gold tones, cinematic haze, reflective surfaces, and premium social-media metaverse atmosphere. Surround the model with exactly 7 translucent Instagram-style UI panels: 1 square “REELS” card with a reels icon, 1 quote card reading “Dream. Create. Inspire.”, 1 engagement stats card showing a heart 98.7K likes, comment 2.3K comments, and share 1.1K shares, 1 profile card showing a circular avatar, “HANIA AI” profile name, 850 posts, 1.2M followers, 320 following, and a pink Follow button, 1 handwritten neon quote panel reading “Influence. Inspire. Illuminate.”, 1 bottom-left icon bar with heart, search, and paper-plane icons, and 1 bottom-right Instagram handle card reading “@HANIA.AI” with the words “Aesthetic. Elegant. Empowering.” Use glowing peach-pink outlines on all interface panels. Camera angle is slightly low and full-body, vertical 2:3 composition, high-resolution, ultra-detailed, glossy luxury commercial poster lighting, soft rim light, realistic reflections on the platform, no watermark, no extra people, no messy text.
